{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = obelisks (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Obelisks are massive slabs of stone on the [[Erinin plains]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
